scripts.build: npm run version:sync && npm run build --workspace @stdo/shared-types && npm run build:core && npm run build --workspace @stdo/server-plugin && npm run build --workspace @stdo/sdk-extension && npm run build --workspace @stdo/example-extension
scripts.test: npm run version:sync && vitest run && cargo test --manifest-path crates/authority-core/Cargo.toml
scripts.sync:installable: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && node ./scripts/installable.mjs sync
